title: SCIM 2.0 Group Resource (RFC 7643 §4.2)
description: Validates a SCIM 2.0 'Group' resource as defined in RFC 7643 §4.2. Schema URN: urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:Group. Pinned to UIAO_143. Intentionally permissive (additionalProperties left open) per the SCIM extensibility model in RFC 7643 §3.3.

displayName.description: RFC 7643 §4.2. Human-readable name for the Group. REQUIRED.

members.description: RFC 7643 §4.2. List of members. Sub-attributes are immutable: 'value' is the SCIM resource id, '$ref' is the resource URI. May reference Users or nested Groups.

value.description: The 'id' attribute of the referenced SCIM resource.

$ref.description: URI of the referenced SCIM resource (User or Group).

type.description: Member type (e.g. 'User', 'Group'); canonical types are not constrained by RFC 7643 §4.2.
